description: Alerts when HVAC has been actively heating for 30+ minutes continuously - likely aux heat strips

data.title: ⚡ Extended HVAC Heating
data.message: {{ trigger.entity_id }} has been heating continuously for 30+ minutes. Aux heat strips may be running. Current temp: {{ state_attr(trigger.entity_id, 'current_temperature') }}°F, Target low: {{ state_attr(trigger.entity_id, 'target_temp_low') }}°F
